identity.name: FlashPulse
identity.metaphor: Stock Market Terminal x Stadium Night Lights

typography.instructions: Use Barlow Condensed for all section titles and team names in headers. Use JetBrains Mono for ALL numbers (scores, time, stats, odds). Use Inter for general UI text (labels, descriptions).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-bold font-heading uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-primary-dark transition-all rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground font-bold font-heading uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-secondary-dark transition-all rounded-sm
buttons.outline: border border-border text-text-primary hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-all rounded-sm

cards.default: bg-background-paper border border-border rounded-lg shadow-card relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.default: bg-background-subtle border border-border rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-text-primary focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-text-disabled

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-background-paper border-r border-border z-50 hidden lg:flex flex-col
navigation.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full bg-background-paper/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-border z-50 flex justify-around py-3 lg:hidden

match_row.container: grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr_auto_1fr_auto] items-center gap-4 p-4 border-b border-border/50 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors cursor-pointer relative
match_row.live_indicator: absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-1 bg-primary animate-pulse

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts: Barlow Condensed (400, 700, 900), JetBrains Mono (400, 500), Inter (400, 500, 600).
Configure Tailwind: Add the custom colors, fonts, and spacing scales defined above.
Force Dark Mode: Apply 'dark' class to the html/body tag by default. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless explicitly asked later.
Layout Strategy: Use the 'Bento Grid Mode B' for the dashboard. Matches are rows, not big cards. Maximize data density.
Component Overrides: Shadcn components must be styled to match the 'background.paper' and 'border.default' colors. Remove default rounded-xl and use rounded-sm or rounded-md for a sharper, tech feel.
Charts: Use Recharts with custom tooltips (dark bg, neon borders). No grid lines on charts, just axes.
Motion: Add 'framer-motion' for live score updates (animate the number changing).
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios are met. Use lighter grays (#94A3B8) on dark backgrounds, not dark grays.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glass borders.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable for layout containers, but TIGHT spacing for data rows.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters.
